run_summary: Standard decider run. No new WINs, no external reports, no pending curmudgeon digest, no pending expansions to integrate. Processed 2 human notes. Created EXP-051 and EXP-052 for ISS-697. WIN-055 Cycle 2 review processed — minor issues already resolved in text, no patches needed.
curmudgeon_reviews_processed: WIN-055 (Cycle 2) — verdict holds (Misleading, 0.93 confidence). Text substantially improved since Cycle 1. Remaining minor issues (geometric tracers, Gaia Milky Way specificity, TRGB cross-check) already addressed in current wins.json text. No patches generated.

pipeline_status.poller: Quiet period continues (3rd consecutive). V51.1 stable at 69 WINs, 94.5% claimed accuracy. Refractive index discrepancy (n=3.49 model page vs n=28.8 review) flagged 3rd consecutive poll — ISS-672 updated with poll_flags counter. Our WIN count: 70 entries (001-069 + WIN-058b variant). Aligned with dome.
pipeline_status.analyst: No latest-analysis-summary found this run. Expansion tracker: EXP-050 (CAT-005 proposal package) pending — highest priority. EXP-041/043/044/048/049 (steelman) complete. EXP-045/046/047 pending steelman. EXP-051/052 newly created for ISS-697.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Phase 1, Cycle 2, 71/69 items reviewed. Digest: 0 pending reviews. 280 missing issues noted from under-covered processed WINs (digest.js warning) — this is expected staleness from processed-reviews.json ledger gaps, not real new reviews.
pipeline_status.integrity: No integrity report found this run.
pipeline_status.tinker: Multiple reports present (latest: 2026-04-08T20-30). Not reviewed this run — no critical pipeline issues detected from other sources.

human_notes_processed.action: Consumed. EXP-050 confirmed pending in expansion tracker with two-phase workflow instructions. ISS-696 already reflects steve decision (approved, new section under The Model tab, new code_analysis tag). No immediate action needed — awaiting EXP-050 completion by analyst. When EXP-050 lands: do NOT integrate as prose; push to curmudgeon priority queue; flag ISS-696 to block on curmudgeon review.

Consumed. Created EXP-051 (methodology prose caveat for Part 3) and EXP-052 (per-WIN post_hoc audit pass). Home-page verbatim quote retrieved from john09289.github.io/predictions — data dependency resolved. Quote: 'Prospective = prediction was timestamped before confirming data was pulled. Not retrofitted. Not explained after the fact. Predicted, then verified.' EXP-052 blocked on EXP-051. ISS-697 updated with expansion item references.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No manual commits. 4 automated monitor.py commits + 1 auto data pull since last poll (~04:08Z to 11:06Z). All core parameters unchanged. V51.1 stable.

poll_summary_triage.item: Refractive index discrepancy (n=3.49 model page vs n=28.8 review) — 3rd consecutive poll flag
poll_summary_triage.action: Already tracked as ISS-672 (assigned-analyst). Updated poll_flags to reflect 3rd consecutive flag. Urgency escalated.

poll_summary_triage.item: 93.3% vs 94.5% accuracy inconsistency on dome evolution page
poll_summary_triage.action: Internal inconsistency in dome site, not a review accuracy issue. Not creating issue.

internal_issues.description: Refractive index discrepancy — 3rd consecutive poll flag. Dome model page: n=3.49 at r=20,015 km. Our review: 28.8. Analyst assigned to reconcile which formulation we used.
Post-hoc tag methodology caveat. EXP-051 and EXP-052 created. Data dependency on home-page quote resolved.

expansions_created_this_run.target: Part 3 methodology prose — post_hoc caveat paragraph citing dome author definition + legitimate-novelty carve-out
expansions_created_this_run.data_dependency_note: Verbatim quote from john09289.github.io/predictions: 'Prospective = prediction was timestamped before confirming data was pulled. Not retrofitted. Not explained after the fact. Predicted, then verified.'

expansions_created_this_run.target: Per-WIN post_hoc audit pass (all post_hoc:true WINs — add rebuttal sentences citing author definition)
expansions_created_this_run.blocked_on: EXP-051 must complete first for consistent language

patches_this_run.rationale: WIN-055 Cycle 2 review found minor issues but current text already addresses them: 'geometric tracers' language already fixed to 'standard candles anchored to Magellanic Cloud geometric parallax', Gaia claim already specifies 'Milky Way Cepheid distances', TRGB already added as third independent rung. No patch needed. All other open issues require analyst expansion work (EXP items), not direct decider patches.

recommended_actions.action: Analyst: complete EXP-050 (CAT-005 Refraction Cascade proposal package — not prose, just structural proposal). Unlocks cascade section and 7+ potential verdict flips. Highest-priority expansion item.
Analyst: resolve ISS-672 (refractive index discrepancy, 3rd consecutive poll flag). Confirm formulation used. If n=28.8 is wrong, patch immediately to avoid discrediting the review.
Analyst: complete EXP-051 (post_hoc methodology caveat), then EXP-052 (per-WIN audit). EXP-052 blocked on EXP-051 language.
Tinker/human: ISS-695 — 19 orphaned EXP files with old filename convention in monitor/analyst/expansions/. Audit and normalize.
